message:
test(integration): add 43 asupersync migration validation tests (ft-1memj.32)

Comprehensive validation suite for the tokio/smol → asupersync migration:
- Surface contract V1 structural invariants (uniqueness, completeness, rationale)
- Surface guard alignment with contract (entry count, dispositions, checks)
- Allowed raw-runtime files policy verification
- RuntimeBuilder and CompatRuntime trait contracts
- Async primitive contracts (sleep, timeout, mpsc, watch, spawn, mutex, rwlock, semaphore)
- Cross-module runtime consistency (contract↔guard agreement)
- Guard report finalization contracts
- Disposition distribution sanity checks
- Compile-time export verification for all channel types
- Migration completeness indicators (retire/replace classification)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
